properties.name: East Coast Region
properties.boundary_basis: Census state boundaries, with KY/TN/FL clipped east of Ohio's western edge
properties.notes: Umbrella region; New England coverage is validated against the non-east regions below. KY, TN, and FL are clipped east of a north/south line from Ohio's west side, excluding Alabama and the western Florida panhandle.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Maine
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Vermont
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Boston / Eastern Massachusetts
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: Eastern Massachusetts plus southern/eastern New Hampshire; overlaps WMA, NH, RI, and CT-RV.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Pioneer Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch and follow-up notes
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Western Massachusetts
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundary west of PV
properties.notes: Western Massachusetts west of the Pioneer Valley.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Connecticut
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Connecticut River Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Census county and county-equivalent boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: North-south overlap along the Connecticut River corridor.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Rhode Island
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Sullivan County / MSV
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundary from follow-up notes
properties.notes: Sullivan County has an active ARES group and is expected to coordinate its own emcomm region.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Eastern New York
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch and follow-up notes, minus MSV
properties.notes: Eastern NY corridor from NYC through the Hudson Valley and Albany, excluding MSV. It stops at the Albany-region footprint and does not continue into the North Country.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: New York City / Lower Hudson
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: NYC and lower Hudson region inside ENY. Dutchess, Orange, and Putnam are left to HV.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Hudson Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: Hudson Valley region inside ENY, excluding MSV and Westchester.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Albany / Capital Region
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: Capital Region / Albany region inside ENY. This is the northern extent of ENY.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Mohawk Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Census county boundaries selected from the sketch
properties.notes: NY interior region from the sketch; included because it was explicitly marked in New York.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files
